'''Gerraba''', a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]], ran afoul of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] circa [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. Jabba posted a small [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on the Wookiee in retaliation.

[[Nilesk]] and her assistant [[Opdoa]], two officials with the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter's]] guild (the [[Goa-Ato/Legends|Goa-Ato]]) sent rookie hunter [[Fask Eelak]] of the [[An'yettu clan]] after Gerraba. They did not expect her to survive the hunt, though they admitted a successful hunt would result in Eelak earning an [[Atiang/Legends|Atiang]] award if her success would be verified. Due to her clan's unpopularity with the regime of [[Navik/Legends|Navik the Red]], [[Grand Protector/Legends|Grand Protector]] of [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]], they intended to make verification of her success difficult.
